findings.issue: Upload type validation relies on filename extension only
findings.recommended_fix: Validate MIME type, file signature/magic bytes, size, and extension together before accepting the upload.

findings.issue: User-controlled filename is written under upload root
findings.evidence_span: target.md: app.py: upload() writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename
findings.recommended_fix: Generate server-side filenames and store uploads outside public executable roots; do not write user-supplied filenames directly into UPLOAD_ROOT.

findings.issue: Upload audit retention is not configured
findings.recommended_fix: Configure audit_log_retention_days and record upload audit events including actor, object, action, result, and timestamp with the configured retention.
